# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: my-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-service.com
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: my-destination-rule
spec:
  host: my-service.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: my-peer-authentication
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector: {}
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  externalTrafficPolicy: Local

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: my-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-service.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-service.com
            port:
              number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd.io
  ports:
    - number: 8089
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-authorization-policy
spec:
  selector: {}
  rules:
    - when:
        - not:
          principles:
            - meshServiceAccount
      log:
        failureMode: ALLOW
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
      from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - '@./*'

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-inject
spec:
  selector: {}
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterAuthenticationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-cluster-authentication-policy
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd.io
  ports:
    - number: 8089
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterAuthenticationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-cluster-authentication-policy-strict
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-disable-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd.io
  ports:
    - number: 8089
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterAuthenticationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-cluster-authentication-policy-disable-mtls
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLED
